name: Sun-Dried Tomato Tapenade
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sun-dried tomatoes in a bowl and cover with boiling water. Set aside until softened, about 2 minutes.
2. Drain and pat dry the tomatoes.
3. When cool, place the tomatoes in a jar and cover with olive oil. Allow to set at room temperature for 1 week.
4. Pick the tomatoes out of the jar, leaving plenty of oil on them. Reserve the remaining oil.
5. In a processor, combine the tomatoes with the capers, garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, and herbs. Pulse until a very coarse, rough puree forms, adding some of the reserved oil if necessary.
6. Season to taste with salt.
